'''Mepha'as Prime''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Belsmuth sector/Legends|Belsmuth sector]]. It had many casinos, gaming halls, arenas, and racing tracks.
